commentary_text: Full on middle, Rahul works it to mid-off and he avoids back-to-back first-ball ducks
Full on leg, Nissanka may feel he missed out there as he can only flick it out to deep square leg
Full outside off, driven to cover

Oh, has he got something on it? KL has been strangled down the leg side!Chahar fires this full and going down leg. Rahul tries to glance it fine and gets a thin inside edge on it. Rickelton pounces on it, diving to his left. Horror dismissal for him!
Inswinger around middle, Rana looks to flick and gets an inside edge onto his pads
Full outside off, swinging away slightly, Nissanka eases a drive to mid-off
Width on offer and Nissanka flays it over cover!This is full and wide and Nissanka throws his bat at it. Easily clears the infielder
And now takes on a back of length delivery, but doesn't get a proper hold of it as he pulls it out to deep square leg on the bounce

Is there anything Bumrah can't do? He nails a direct hit now and Rana has to go!Rana taps this full ball in front on the leg side and is a bit slow to start off on the run. He doesn't really go full speed and is caught short at the non-striker's end as Bumrah is quick to collect, turn and hit the target
Full outside off, Nissanka looks to drive on the off side but gets an inside edge through square leg
Full around off, blocked towards midwicket
Full outside off, 136.7kph, Nissanka meets it with a crisply timed drive, but it's straight to mid-off
Yorker on leg, Nissanka jams his bat down and squeezes it towards point
That's a hit-me ball and Nissanka obliges. Back of length delivery sliding down leg and Nissanka helps it over fine leg. Couple of bounces and four. Didn't hit that cleanly, but got enough on it
Almost an epic return catch!Nissanka skips out to this length ball and slaps it right down the ground. Chahar sticks his right hand out but the ball pops out. That was hit hard
Nissanka backs away leg side and Chahar tries to follow him. Nissanka doesn't quite time it as he lofts it back over the bowler, but Santner at mid-off is able to come in and intercept
Inside edge trickles away. Santner follows Nissanka down leg with an arm ball. Nissanka looks to work it leg side and just about gets enough on it to beat short fine leg to his right
Reverse-swatted over cover point!Length ball going down leg but Nissanka got in position early. Gets it just over a leaping Rohit Sharma for back-to-back boundaries
Looks to slap this length ball down the ground but gets it off the toe of the bat to the bowler's left
Sweeps this full ball outside off through midwicket
On a length outside off, Rizvi waits on it and punches it down to long-off
Length ball angled into him, tucked to midwicket where Tilak makes a good stop
Rizvi steps out early, Thakur pulls back his length. Rizvi squeezes it out on the off side

Latched on to that and how! Nissanka has struggled with his timing today, but boy did that one sound sweet!. Back of length knuckle ball and Nissanka picked it early. Climbs into it and pulls it over the square leg boundary
hold the pose, Pathum!This is a slot ball on off and Nissanka lofts him right back over his head
Now Thakur responds with a slower bouncer angled across Nissanka, who tries to hook but can't touch it as it sails over his left shoulder. One bouncer for the over

Nissanka is tearing into Shardul Thakur!He's picked this over as the one to transfer pressure on to Mumbai Indians. Backs away leg side and Thakur follows him with a full ball. He frees his arms and launches him down the ground
Full on off, pushed to mid-on
Back of length outside off. Nissanka is early into the shot and ends up chopping it towards point
looks to whip away this full ball outside off but gets it off the bottom half of the bat towards deep square leg
Nearly hits this back to Bumrah! Slower ball, full outside off, Rizvi prods at it and the ball goes low towards Bumrah, almost carrying to the bowler
Yorker on off, squeezed towards extra cover
Almost beats mid-off!Full outside off, pace off, Nissanka drives it wide of mid-off but SKY is quick to run across and put in a dive to make the stop
Yorker on off, dug back out to the bowler's left
Drive this full ball outside off to extra cover's right. SKY makes a good stop
Oh, Rizvi was very early into that shot. He was through the pull on this length ball that takes forever to arrive, and Rizvi takes a blow to the midriff
Length ball coming in and he misses the pull and gets nutmegged

Rizvi responds with some aggression!Beaten the last two balls, this one he takes on and takes on so well. Loopy and full delivery on off, drifting in, but Rizvi is able to launch it straight of mid-on
An appeal for caught behind as Rizvi tries to sweep this length ball going down leg. They confer and decide against reviewing
Full on leg, whipped away to deep midwicket
Rizvi tries another sweep but misses. Goes to short fine's right off his pad
Back of length offcutter. Rizvi waits on it and dabs it to short third
Rizvi skips out to this full ball and hits it flat to the bowler's left. Markande flings himself with his arms outstretched but it eludes him and goes to long-off
Flicked through midwicket
Legbreak on a length outside off, slapped to cover
This length ball goes down leg
Full and flat on middle and off, drilled down to long-off
On a length on leg, he goes back and tucks it through midwicket
Full outside off, blocked towards cover and we are at the halfway stage of the chase
Full outside off, steered square on the off side with an open face
Thakur nails this yorker and Nissanka squeezes it out towards the off side for a single
Rizvi tries to take on this back of length delivery but can't connect cleanly. Goes up in the air but lands safe in the midwicket region

Oh no, that's dropped!Nissanka steps across and flicks this 137kph full ball. But it doesn't have the distance, and the fielder is running in from the ropes. He has to put in a forward dive, but can't hold on to the ball
Rizvi, what a shot!Rizvi waits on this full ball and nonchalantly flicks this over square leg and sends it sailing. Strong wrists!
Looks for the yorker, gets the length right but the ball flies down leg for a wide
Very full around off, flicked down to long-on
Yorker just outside off, squeezed out to to mid-off
Length outside off, defended without transferring weight, to backward point. 126ks
Rizvi's marked his match-up. Gets a slot ball to dine on too. Goes square-on in the crease, swings through the line and clears the boundary as long-off runs to the right
Length on the pads, flicked to deep midwicket
Full on leg, stays leg side of the ball and flicks to deep midwicket
Wide on a length, one-handed slash to deep point. 80ks
Goes for the leg-stump yorker. Undercooks it a touch but it beats the flick and hits the pad
A bit short outside off, Rizvi waits on it and plays a late cut behind point and the ball races away. Lovely timing and placement
Floated full outside off, driven out to long-off
Nissanka takes on the full ball with a sweep to deep midwicket's right and Tilak makes a good stop
Eases this through midwicket

Oh, he's skied that and Markande runs a long way to grab it! This is a huge moment in the game. This is dragged down a little and Nissanka looks to swivel and pull but ends up with a top edge that balloons up behind him. Markande runs across from short fine leg and grabs it. Big, big blow for DC
Steve Smith's come to the IPL... Rizvi clears the front leg again, waits for the back-of-length ball slower one to arrive. There's room to work with, and he slaps it Tennis-style over cover
118ks length ball on off, defended to the bowler's right
Slower length ball outside off, square driven to point. 120ks
Rizvi making up now. Flays the slower one just over wide mid-off. It was full and around off, he cleared the leg a touch, opened the face and swung hard

A ducking ramp over the keeper. Was a slower one that didn't bounce too much, Rizvi noticed he was right next to the ball and then lifted his bat around his shoulder and gave it a poke upwards. Middled it
139ks but it lands before going to the keeper. Dug into the pitch just outside off, Rizvi swung across the line and missed
Wide on a back of length, Rizvi has a hearty slash and it clears deep point
Full 91ks ball on the pads, flicked to midwicket
93ks googly comes in and beats the flick. Hit the back pad. Rizvi on the back foot. Made sure he didn't run through with the momentum

Up and over long-off to bring up fifty! Rizvi holds the bat in front of his chest to declare he's here to stay. He's gone from 25 off 23 to 51 off 31. This was just a touch too full if at all, Rizvi's well set and is able to lift it wit a clean swing.
Turns a length ball into a slot one by dancing down, back leg cranes up as he stands still and drives through the line for a straight six
WIde on a length, cut to cover
Slower one is fullish outside off, Rizvi is running after going for the cover drive and missing
Length on off, 113ks, guided to short third. Rizvi can't stand still, goes for the run and is sent back

Bumrah is confident with the lbw appeal, not given. Ball goes to the keeper, Rizvi had to run back again as the throw came through. No direct hit, would've been out had Rickelton hit. No review taken. Replay shows the low full toss took the inside edge as Rizvi looked to flick through midwicket
Miller shows Bumrah respect by getting on the front foot and defending the full ball to the off side
Slower one beats him, not far from off stump either. Back of length, Miller wanted to pull it. Crouched in reflex to adjust to the low bounce, can't.
Chahar slower ball is no Bumrah slower ball. No zip off the pitch, not a cutter replay shows. Rizvi makes room and crashes it through the off side
Rizvi beaten by pace. Clutched his hands back towards his chest as the ball followed him. Hits the body and goes back
Missed yorker has been picked up in style. All wrists. Stayed in the crease, had the angle in to work with, flicked it over backward square leg
Too straight again, the slower one on leg stump is shovelled off a length. Goes to the right of deep fine leg. Santner dives and holds onto his right shoulder. Will continue fielding
Slower bouncer takes ages to arrive, Rizvi goes for the slashing upper cut. Missed it. Was in the right position for it though
Yep, and it's a bad ball too. Slower one outside off sat up without gripping. Rizvi then let it sit up and slapped it over point.Fifty partnership up, out of which Miller has contributed one
Looks to help it fine with a pull, misses the slower one. Ball goes off the belly to the off side
Looks to turn it to the leg side. Gets opened up, fullish ball goes to the off side
All style, all substance too! Clears the front leg, arches the upper-body back and is still able to drive the ball ferociously through extra cover. Talk about flair
And again. This short ball is much closer to the batter. Rizvi swings hard again and misses
Wide shortish ball is slow and is let go. Rizvi cleared the front leg and wanted to go leg side
Miller happy to play the Jack Leach role. Full just outside off, defended to deep point

Short third saves three, Shardul gets low to the left. Stops it with one hand. 120ks short ball lands outside off and finishes over off. Rizvi keeps his wrists close while guiding it with an open face
No see-off business there. Miller leans across and crunches a cover drive to a decent fullish length ball. Landed just past the ring and blazed away
Nearly a yorker and that's enough of a miss for Miller to capitalise. Has pace to flick it through midwicket, beats to the left

Slower one just outside off. Tennis-ball bounce. Let go. Ump gives it wide. Bumrah wants it reviewed. MI take it. Third umpire doesn't even bring out the measurements, sees Miller upright and the ball well above him. Calls it
Fullish length ball at the stumps, 118ks, flicked to midwicket
Yorker on off, clears the front leg and swings with one hand. Goes off the toe through midwicket

Rizvi show ends and he falls looking for a six. Gets a handshake from Miller and a couple of MI players too. Was a 133ks slot ball canting into middle and leg. Rizvi bent his back leg just a bit too much and drove hard. Got it a too low, he knew he'd mistimed it right away. Long-off takes it. Been a hell of a knock though
Yorker outside off, knocks it to the off side
Pitched up and slightly down leg, beats the flick and goes off the pads to the keeper's left
Overpitched and a touch wide, bottom hand takes over as Miller drives to cover
Low full toss on off, punched to long-on
Low full toss has been clobbered across the line, Dhir dives to the left from long-on, in vain. Miller whipping it wristily
Low full toss on off has been driven to long-off
Another yorker attempt. Shin-high full toss, punched to long-off
Yorker just outside off, jammed to the right of long-off
Final ball in fact. Low full toss on leg stump is flicked fine. Races for four
